## Analyze simulation results {.unnumbered}


### Description

Analyze simulation results



### Usage

<pre><code class='language-R'>analyze_sims(data)
</code></pre>


### Arguments

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="data">data</code></td>
<td>
a tibble::tbl_df with columns:


<ul>
<li> <code>lambda.sim</code>,

</li>
<li> <code>incidence.rate</code>,

</li>
<li> <code>SE</code>,

</li>
<li> <code>CI.lwr</code>,

</li>
<li> <code>CI.upr</code>
for example, as produced by <code>summary.seroincidence.by()</code> with
<code>lambda.sim</code> as a stratifying variable

</li></ul>
</td></tr>
</table>


### Value

a <code>sim_results</code> object (extends tibble::tbl_df)



### Examples
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
library("serocalculator")


dmcmc <- typhoid_curves_nostrat_100

n_cores <- 2

nclus <- 20
# cross-sectional sample size
nrep <- c(50, 200)

# incidence rate in e
lambdas <- c(.05, .8)

antibodies <- c("HlyE_IgA", "HlyE_IgG")
lifespan <- c(0, 10)
dlims = rbind(
"HlyE_IgA" = c(min = 0, max = 0.5),
"HlyE_IgG" = c(min = 0, max = 0.5)
)
sim_df <- sim_pop_data_multi(
n_cores = n_cores,
lambdas = lambdas,
nclus = nclus,
sample_sizes = nrep,
age_range = lifespan,
antigen_isos = antibodies,
renew_params = FALSE,
add_noise = TRUE,
curve_params = dmcmc,
noise_limits = dlims,
format = "long"
)
cond <- tibble::tibble(
antigen_iso = c("HlyE_IgG", "HlyE_IgA"),
nu = c(0.5, 0.5), # Biologic noise (nu)
eps = c(0, 0), # M noise (eps)
y.low = c(1, 1), # low cutoff (llod)
y.high = c(5e6, 5e6)
)
ests <-
est_seroincidence_by(
pop_data = sim_df,
sr_params = dmcmc,
noise_params = cond,
num_cores = n_cores,
strata = c("lambda.sim", "sample_size", "cluster"),
curve_strata_varnames = NULL,
noise_strata_varnames = NULL,
verbose = FALSE,
build_graph = FALSE, # slows down the function substantially
antigen_isos = c("HlyE_IgG", "HlyE_IgA")
)

ests |>
summary() |>
analyze_sims()




```
